title: Add nix flake
description: Add a nix flake to the project. See tendril and other rust caco projects as examples for implementation details and best practices.
creator: ms-mac:cacophony:harryaskham

title: Surface project config validation blockers in caco commands
description: While finishing bd-5c2b47 in the kittui project, every caco surface I tried (`caco msg speak`, `caco scratch append`, and `caco agent reintegrate`) failed because an unrelated `projects['picasso'].friend_projects[0].permissions` entry contained invalid permission `checkout_write`. The operator fixed the config, but the failure mode was surprising because a picasso config issue blocked kittui lifecycle/status narration and scratch health-note reconciliation. Consider making config validation errors identify the owning config path/project and, if safe, isolate unrelated project operations from invalid friend-project permission entries. Filed via reflect-session mixin from bd-5c2b47 session.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

bead.title: Implement deterministic Scene normalization before hashing
bead.description: DESIGN.md says Scene::id() must hash a deterministic normalized scene: drop empty/zero-opacity layers, flatten normal composites, snap pixel rects to 1/64 px, clamp/sort gradient stops, and remove zero-width/transparent structural no-ops. Current crates/kittui-core/src/scene.rs hashes the raw serde form directly, so semantically equivalent scenes can miss the cache and produce different kitty ids. Add a normalizer in kittui-core, test id stability/equivalence with property or fixture tests, and keep serde JSON compatibility stable.
bead.creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

bead.title: Implement Image node rasterization and kittui image CLI
bead.description: DESIGN.md defines Node::Image plus CLI `kittui image --src PATH -w W -h H --fit ... --tint ...`. Current CPU renderer returns UnsupportedImage for Node::Image and GPU encode drops image nodes; the CLI has no image subcommand. Implement PNG/JPEG image decoding behind the intended feature split, shared Fit geometry, CPU raster copy/tint path, GPU texture/atlas or documented CPU fallback path, image cache storage, and CLI coverage with tests.
bead.creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

bead.title: Implement real Mask, Clip, and BlendMode rendering semantics
bead.description: DESIGN.md includes Node::Composite with BlendMode::{Normal, Add, Multiply, Screen}, Node::Mask, and Node::Clip. Current CPU rasterizer passes through Composite children using normal source-over and renders Mask/Clip children without applying mask alpha or clip bounds; GPU encode similarly ignores the blend/mask/clip semantics. Implement matching CPU/GPU semantics or explicit CPU-first semantics with golden tests for add/multiply/screen, masked content, and clipped content.
bead.creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

bead.creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

bead.title: Complete terminal transport probing and File/Memory transfer modes
bead.description: DESIGN.md specifies TerminalInfo::detect(), automatic tmux detection, and kitty File/Memory transports (`a=t,t=f` and `a=t,t=s`) in addition to Direct/TmuxPassthrough. Current TerminalInfo only provides defaults/overrides, and kittui-kitty treats File/Memory like direct chunked base64. Implement environment probing over TERM/TERM_PROGRAM/KITTY_WINDOW_ID/KITTY_PUBLIC_KEY/TMUX/WT_SESSION, CLI transport override, file-transfer emission, shared-memory transfer where supported with safe fallback, and tests for all transport encodings.
bead.creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

bead.title: Finish v1 CLI surface from DESIGN.md
bead.description: DESIGN.md lists a broader CLI than currently implemented: panel, image, place, scene emit, cache info/gc/clear, probe --force, --transport, --renderer, --upload-only/--placement-only/--embed-only, --dry-run, pixel and percentage sizing, richer colors, glow/scanline/shadow/label options, and animation curve validation. Some cache commands exist, but most common flags and subcommands do not. Fill out the v1 CLI surface in thin wrappers over Runtime/Composition and add integration tests for JSON/dry-run/raw output modes.
bead.creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

bead.title: Complete FFI ABI surface and generated header workflow
bead.description: DESIGN.md defines a larger C ABI: runtime_configure, render_json, unplace, last_error, probe_json, bytes_free, abi_version_check, explicit byte lengths, cbindgen header snapshots, and ABI drift checks. Current kittui-ffi exposes runtime_new/free, place_json, string_free, abi_version, and a hand-maintained header/test scaffold. Implement the remaining ABI functions, preserve panic-safe boundaries, generate/update kittui.h through an xtask/cbindgen workflow, and add ABI snapshot validation.
bead.creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

bead.title: Add renderer probe cache and GPU parity gating to Runtime Auto mode
bead.description: DESIGN.md says Runtime Auto should try GPU once, run a CPU/GPU parity fixture with SSIM tolerance, persist gpu_status/gpu_adapter/gpu_parity_ssim in <cache>/probe.json, and skip future live probes until invalidated. kittui-cache has a ProbeRecord helper, but Runtime currently only lazily initializes GPU and permanently falls back within the process without parity checking or persisted probe decisions. Wire probe.json into RuntimeBuilder/Auto mode, implement probe --force invalidation, and test fallback behavior.
bead.creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

bead.title: Implement user Shader node rendering and pipeline cache
bead.description: DESIGN.md/Future ideas mention Node::Shader with per-scene WGSL pipeline compilation, caching, and GPU execution, while CPU should return a clear GPU-only error. Current GPU encode accepts Shader in the type system but draws nothing, and CPU returns UnsupportedImage. Implement shader validation, uniform binding, per-scene pipeline cache, error reporting, and tests that Shader nodes either render through GPU or fail clearly under CPU-only mode.
bead.creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev
